title: astragalus tegetarius var. rotundus
intro: Astragalus tegetarius var. rotundus, also known as Astragalus rotundifolius, is a type of plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China, used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory effects, and is used to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce symptoms of fatigue and stress. Astragalus rotundifolius can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
